name: bedrock-forge-ops
description: Shortcut commands for local Docker lifecycle

scripts.seed: docker compose --env-file .env --profile seed run --rm --no-deps --build nest-api sh -c "npm run prisma:seed"
scripts.seed:demo: docker compose --env-file .env --profile seed run --rm --no-deps --build -e SEED_DEMO_MODE=true nest-api sh -c "npm run prisma:seed"
